def positive_asyncio_gather_without_return_exceptions_on_partial_failure_path():
    rule_id = "asyncio_gather_without_return_exceptions_on_partial_failure_path"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "asyncio.gather called without return_exceptions=True on a code path where partial failure should be recoverable."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
